1-year-vs-2-year-mba.description: A practical comparison of one-year and two-year MBA programs. Covers cost, career switching, internships, top schools, and how to decide which format fits your goals.

mba-without-work-experience.title: MBA Without Work Experience: Who Actually Gets In and How
mba-without-work-experience.description: Can you get an MBA with no work experience? A realistic look at deferred enrollment programs, direct-admit options, and what 'no experience' actually means.

mba-scholarships-guide.title: MBA Scholarships: How to Fund a Top Program Without $200K in Debt

mba-roi-analysis.title: MBA ROI: Is a $200K Degree Actually Worth It?
mba-roi-analysis.description: A rigorous breakdown of MBA return on investment by school tier, industry, and geography. Total cost analysis, break-even timelines, and which programs deliver the best financial returns.

mba-application-timeline.title: MBA Application Timeline: A Month-by-Month Guide from GMAT to Decision Day
mba-application-timeline.description: The complete MBA application timeline with specific deadlines for M7, T15, and European programs. When to take the GMAT, start essays, request recommendations, and submit each round.

mba-essay-tips.title: MBA Essay Tips: What Admissions Committees Actually Want
mba-essay-tips.description: Data-driven essay writing advice from analyzing 341 real successful MBA essays and 67,000+ admissions decisions.
